caption: A man wearing a white dress shirt, tan suspenders, a red bow tie, glasses, and a tall, grey, pointed wig sits in a studio setting. He wears black over-ear headphones and is positioned in front of a professional black microphone. The background features a wall decorated with numerous framed photographs and clothing displayed on mannequins. A logo featuring a microphone and the text "GOSS TALK JOY" is visible on the right side of the scene, while a smaller logo that reads "PODCAST" appears on the left. Throughout the sequence, the man remains seated and maintains a similar posture, though he slightly shifts his head and facial expression, looking toward the left of the frame. The setting, his attire, and the surrounding equipment remain constant across the scene.
